elements.title: lang::report_page_020_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT MIN(kbi_ra.id),
       kbi_c.id                                                                    AS courseid,
       kbi_c.fullname                                                              AS course_name,
       GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT kbi_r0.shortname)                                     AS role,
       MIN(kbi_lsl.all_count)                                                      AS all_count,
       CASE WHEN MIN(kbi_lsl.all_count) > 1 THEN MAX(kbi_r.shortname) ELSE '-' END     AS action_role,
       CASE WHEN MIN(kbi_lsl.all_count) > 1 THEN MAX(kbi_log.action) ELSE '-' END      AS action,
       CASE WHEN MIN(kbi_lsl.all_count) > 1 THEN MAX(kbi_log.timecreated) ELSE '-' END AS timecreated,
       CASE
         WHEN MIN(kbi_lsl.all_count) > 1 THEN MAX(CONCAT(kbi_u_action.firstname, ' ', kbi_u_action.lastname))
         ELSE '-' END                                                          AS user_action,
       MAX(kbi_u_action.id)                                                        AS user_action_id,
       MAX(kbi_u_related.firstname)                                                AS firstname,
       MAX(kbi_u_related.lastname)                                                 AS lastname,
       MAX(kbi_u_related.email)                                                    AS email,
       MAX(kbi_u_related.id)                                                       AS user_related_id
FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra
       JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid AND kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
       LEFT JOIN mdl_role kbi_r0 ON kbi_r0.id = kbi_ra.roleid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_ctx.instanceid
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_lsl.courseid, kbi_lsl.relateduserid, MAX(kbi_lsl.id) AS last_change, COUNT(kbi_lsl.id) AS all_count
                  FROM mdl_local_kopere_bi_log_tmp kbi_lsl
                         JOIN mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra1 ON kbi_ra1.userid = kbi_lsl.relateduserid
                         JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx1 ON kbi_ctx1.id = kbi_ra1.contextid AND kbi_ctx1.instanceid = kbi_lsl.courseid
                  WHERE (kbi_lsl.action = 'assigned' OR kbi_lsl.action = 'unassigned')
                    AND kbi_lsl.target = 'role'
                    AND kbi_lsl.contextlevel = 50
                    AND kbi_ctx1.contextlevel = 50
                  GROUP BY kbi_lsl.courseid, kbi_lsl.relateduserid) lsl ON kbi_lsl.courseid = kbi_c.id AND kbi_lsl.relateduserid = kbi_ra.userid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_local_kopere_bi_log_tmp kbi_log ON kbi_log.id = kbi_lsl.last_change
       LEFT JOIN mdl_role kbi_r ON kbi_r.id = kbi_log.objectid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_user kbi_u_action ON kbi_u_action.id = kbi_log.userid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_user kbi_u_related ON kbi_u_related.id = kbi_log.relateduserid
WHERE kbi_ra.id > 0
  AND kbi_c.id = :courseid
GROUP BY kbi_ra.userid, kbi_c.id
